title: melissa purpurascens
intro: Melissa purpurascens, also known as the lemon balm, is a perennial herb belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It is commonly used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiviral, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which help alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Melissa purpurascens include reducing stress levels, promoting relaxation, and improving mood, as well as providing relief from cold sores and other viral infections. Melissa purpurascens can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in aromatherapy to promote a sense of calm and well-being.
